verification.detail: Kernel executed on Model/Ascend950PR_9599, verification passed

notes: Golden kernel verified on CANN 9.0.0 simulator (Ascend950PR_9599 / C310 / arch35) in Docker. Two-kernel + host-dispatcher structure mirroring CANN's KernelRmsNormRegBase (full_row, tiling key 5000) and KernelRmsNormRegBaseSplitD (split_d, tiling key 2001). Float16 input/output with float32 accumulator: loaded tiles cast via .to(asc.float32), output cast back via .to(x.dtype) before asc2.store. Inputs are torch.Tensor (numpy is silently zeroed on C310). Test shapes (8, 256) for full_row (atol=rtol=2e-2) and (8, 1055) for split_d (atol=rtol=5e-2) are both verified in a single run_kernel call.
